programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With less than a week to go before the marathon, Arg, Billi and Cara continue their training, with the help of Ricardo. Mario and Ricky rib Little Chris over his failed attempt at chatting up Frankie. Gemma has a clothing line launch.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We follow the progress of Arg, Billi and Cara in the London Marathon. Bobby gets plastic surgery advice from Chloe and Lauren P. Charlie and Gemma have a heart to heart after Gemma was uncovered as Ricky’s mystery texter.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Billi, Cara and Arg recover after completing the London marathon. Chloe and the girls take her daughter to the farm for her birthday. Lucy and Mario celebrate their one year anniversary.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It’s Mick’s birthday and he’s throwing a party Vegas Style – everyone is going. Sam, Billie, Gemma and Lucy try out Pole Dancing. Mario takes Little Chris to get his chest waxed.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Sam throws a dinner party for all of the ‘couples’. We meet Gemma’s new mystery man Rami. Tom P and Lauren P go on a date to a vineyard- will he do enough to impress her?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: There’s a new girl on the block. The girl Tom K has been texting is revealed and there are a few unhappy campers. We find out the goss after Lauren P’s and Tom P’s snog. Joey’s in trouble with Sam. Nanny Pat gets new dentures.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey thinks he might have made a mistake by dumping Sam, but is it too late? Lucy does a photoshoot for her new swimwear range. It’s the launch night of Bobby’s brand new hairdressing Academy. The tension simmers between Gemma and her ex Charlie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The rivalry between the boys escalates and Diags is determined to confront Mario. Lauren comes face-to-face with Tom P questioning him over his decision to choose Lauren P over her. Gemma apologizes to Bobby for ruining his open night.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lucy and Mario host their engagement party, but who will be invited? Joey and Sam go on a double date with Essex’s newest couple, Arg and Gemma. Little Chris makes Mario an engagement present, but will he be his best man?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mick and Debbie host a glam Essex Sports Day including a three-legged couple race. There is a new romance on the cards for Lauren G. Jess finds herself stuck in the middle of Lucy and Mario and Sam and Joey.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey celebrates his Birthday with an 80’s themed party. Lauren P and Lauren G come face to face for the first time since Lauren G started seeing Tom P. Gemma gets stuck in the middle of a row between boyfriend Arg, and his former girlfriend, Lydia.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tom P takes Lauren Goodger to the cinema, for their first date. Jess gives Ricky an ultimatum. Arg turns up on Gemma’s doorstep with a surprise, but will she like it?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Bobby confides in best friend Lydia that he thinks he's fallen in love with Charlie; Sam and Lucy agree to meet and make up over the cheating accusations against Mario.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Everyone heads out to celebrate Charlie's birthday; sensing something is wrong with Bobby, Charlie tries to comfort his best friend although Bobby drops a bombshell. Jamie Reed makes quite an impression on a few of the ladies.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg bumps into Jamie, but how will he react? Mario talks to Tom P about texting Jess. Sam hosts a BBQ, but who will turn up?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jess hosts a showcase for her new single. Sam and Joey have a tennis lesson, but who will come out on top? New boy Jamie continues to ruffle feathers.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Lauren Goodger has her doubts about Tom P. Arg takes Gemma for a surprise singing lesson. Bobby celebrates his birthday with a trip to Southend and a gay night out.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lucy throws a prom for her 21st Birthday. One of the couples gets voted prom King and Queen. Jamie apologizes to Frankie, but will it be accepted?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Gemma is sick of Arg. Charlie wants to progress things with Danni. Joey and Sam seek divine intervention.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey and Arg have an accident. Charlie gets a talking to. Lauren P bumps into an old friend.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Debbie makes her feelings known to Tom K. The girls get sporty. Arg and Tom fallout. Charlie has a few words with Danni and Bobby confronts Danni.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Lucy lays her cards on the table. Mario seeks some advice from his brother in law. Lydia sets the record straight. and the boys launch a full scale operation to retrieve what is rightfully Arg’s!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cara gives her little brother some sisterly advice. Mick is told a friend of his is hitting-on a Honey. Joey tries to find Arg a date and the Netball team is decided.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Kirk seeks some professional help. Mario bares all to win back Lucy’s affection. Arg goes on a blind date and Ricky makes a proposal.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg does a runner. Chloe plays her first DJ set and Mario and Tom K receive a shocking picture.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bobby and Danni have a row. Arg plays his biggest gig yet.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Gemma holds a singles night. Joey becomes a superhero. The boys become spies and Charlie drops a bombshell.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Arg changes his image. The girls have their first netball match. Gemma gets knocked back and Bobby tries his luck in lederhosen.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: There’s double trouble, the patter of tiny feet and lots of real-life drama, plus a birthday night to remember for all the wrong reasons for Lucy & Mario

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: As the dust settles on Sunday’s explosive episode, what next for Lucy and Mario? Gemma launches her brand new diet club, Bobby’s quest to become a dad continues plus could there be the patter of tint feet for Lauren and Kirk…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: All the latest drama from Essex as Lucy searches for the truth about Mario, Gemma’s Diet Club continues on horseback, Joey starts recruiting staff for his brand new shop, and could it be third time lucky for Kirk and Lauren…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. Lucy heads off on a mystery date… Danny Walia tries his luck with a visit to a model agency.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. After their twitter rant – what next for Lucy and Mario? The cast celebrate Mother’s Day Essex-style,.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Charlotte's back! And her arrival couldn't have come at a worse time. New lad Aaron wins a date with Holly after her challenge, but he reveals he's actually got a thing for Vicky. (S8, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: With Charlotte back in the house, all eyes are on Gary and Marnie and whether they'll decide to continue sleeping together. (S8, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: Things kick off in the house as Aaron hears Vicky and the girls slagging him off on the eve of his third date with Vicky. (S8,ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: New boy Kyle gets properly settled into the house by spending the night with Holly, and the Geordies take Tash on Tours international as they jet off to Reykjavik, Iceland for some partying. (S8, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 807
programme.desc: After checking out the local guys, girls and geysers in Iceland, the Geordies head back to the Toon, where it all kicks off as Aaron and Scott find out the truth about Gary and Marnie. (S8, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 808
programme.desc: Will Aaron and Marnie finally get together, and will Scott and Gary make up? Meanwhile, Charlotte and Holly announce Geordie Shore's first-ever wedding. (S8, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Buzzin'! Our favourite party animals are back! Everyone is shocked when Vicky gets a promotion and becomes their boss. Holly tries to stay classy by not jumping into bed with Kyle. (S9, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 902
programme.desc: Holly has a house party but there's a massive kick-off between the lads when Marnie tries to make Aaron jealous by necking on with Kyle. (S9, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 903
programme.desc: The Geordies head to Paris for a Tash-on Tours job. Vicky gets unprofessionally mortal at work, and, on returning to the Toon, Charlotte leaves for crisis talks with her boyfriend. (S9, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Charlotte and Gary find themselves gravitating together after she returns from a showdown with her boyfriend. Vicky struggles to convince Marnie to take work seriously. (S9, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Geordies hit the road to host a Tash-On Tours hoedown for young farmers in Gloucestershire. \"Psycho\" Charlotte is back when she sees Gary talking to another girl. (S9, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Gary pretends to get a tattoo of Charlotte's initials behind his ear, but she freaks out and says something she regrets. Meanwhile there's drama between Aaron and Marnie. (S9, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the Geordie Shore house! But there are tears amidst the tinsel when Vicky returns with unexpected news. Kyle hopes for a special Xmas present from Holly. (S9, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: When Charlotte finds out about a pact between Gary and Aaron she hatches a plan - but will she end up with egg on her face? Meanwhile James is having doubts about his future in the house. (S10, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1002
programme.desc: James makes a shock announcement and two new housemates come through the door. But the newbies' first night out is ruined when a fight breaks out between Charlotte, Marnie and Holly. (S10, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1003
programme.desc: It's the Newbies' first morning in the house but with Holly, Kyle and Charlotte gone how will the family get back together? A shock revelation from Gary leaves Charlotte heartbroken. (S10, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1004
programme.desc: It's the day that Charlotte's been dreading, Gary introduces his new girlfriend to the family but will Psycho Charlotte put in an appearance? Meanwhile Marnie and Aaron get very flirty! (S10, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1005
programme.desc: When Anna says there's a job for the Geordies in another country, they're all buzzing! That is until they turn up to a Caravan site in Wales. Marnie decides to give Aaron some home truths. (S10, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: Hamburg is about to feel the full force of Tash on Tours, but are they ready for Marnie kicking off at Aaron? Holly's getting paranoid about her non-relationship with Kyle. (S10, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Chloe meets \"Psycho Charlotte\" after a night out goes sour, and Holly's return is ruined when she's confronted with the true reason Kyle doesn't want to make their relationship official. (S10, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1008
programme.desc: Scotty T is back to 'jump start' the final episode with a dare-devil activity for his Geordie crew. Meanwhile, tensions run high as Holly waits to hear Kyle's decision. Last in the series. (S10, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1101
programme.desc: The Geordies are back and buzzin' as big boss Anna sends them off to Greece! Holly and Kyle kick off, while Gaz and Charlotte find themselves in a very awkward situation. (S11, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1102
programme.desc: Big boss Anna sends the guys to their new home in Crete. Chloe wants to know where she stands with Scott. Charlotte and Marnie have some explaining to do after their first night in Malia. (S11, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1103
programme.desc: Gaz's pulling competition causes a bust up for Aaron and Scott. Charlotte tells Holly some home truths about Kyle while the toga party sees Chloe and Scott get closer than ever. (S11, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1104
programme.desc: Chloe causes carnage at the boat party while Kyle comes to a big decision over Holly. Marnie sees Kyle at the club and the simmering tensions boil over and it all kicks off. (S11, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1105
programme.desc: Gaz gives newly dumped Holly some tough love. Kyle enjoys his first lads' night until the girls turn up unannounced. Charlotte kicks off leaving the boys and girls torn apart. (S11, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1106
programme.desc: Kyle and Hollys' split continues to divide the boys and girls. Scott upsets Chloe, Holly confronts Kyle while Charlotte goes to extraordinary lengths in search of a kebab. (S11, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1107
programme.desc: Chloe's attempt to get Scott's attention goes badly while the Holly & Kyle situation comes to a head. The boys come to blows with huge consequences for Holly & Kyle. (S11, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 111
programme.desc: Questions are answered when Snooki, The Situation, JWOWW, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi and Vinny return for more fights and insights into what happened down at the Jersey Shore. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore crew is headed to Miami! They are shocked by the surprise arrival of former housemate, Angelina, and the drama picks up right where it left off at the seaside. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Sammi tries to figure out what Ronnie really did at the club the night before. When Angelina interrupts Pauly's game, we see a whole new side of the usually calm Pauly D. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Angelina apologises to the girls. But back at the house, Mike, Vinny and Pauly have a close encounter with grenades in the hot tub, while Ron continues to creep behind Sammi's back. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Ron's bad behaviour puts Snooki, Angelina and JWOWW in a tough spot. Together the girls decide to write an 'anonymous' letter to Sammi and finally reveal the entire truth. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Sammi finds Snooki and Jenni's 'anonymous' letter, and this time it's really over with Ronnie. Mike, Vinny and Pauly ('MVP') have their hands full, juggling four girls in one night! (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: The anonymous note causes tension between the girls, culminating in a full-blown cat-fight. And after sharing a night in bed with Vinny, Snooki reveals a not-so-little known fact. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The roommates deal with the aftermath of the fight. Angelina starts dating Jose, a guy from the club; Jenni and Snooki clean up the smush room in preparation for Snooki's hook-up. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: When news gets out that Angelina and Vinny hooked up, Mike threatens to spill the beans to Jose. Vinny and Pauly find the girls of their dreams, but one of them will be heartbroken. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: Things go south for Angelina when the house learns that she slept with Jose after smushing Vinnie, but trouble really ensues when she gets too close to a guy Snooki hooked up with. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 210
programme.desc: Mike reunites with his Canadian hottie, providing entertainment for the whole house. But when Angelina tells her roommates how she really feels, she pushes Snooki into a frenzy. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 211
programme.desc: With Angelina gone, Snooki thinks it's time that she and Jenni bury the hatchet with Sam but Snooki's happiness is short-lived as Mark becomes increasingly belligerent with her. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 212
programme.desc: Everyone is frustrated with Mike's poor game after he gets them kicked out of a club, gets the car towed, nearly burns down the house and fails as a wingman for Pauly D - twice! (S2, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinnie have final dates with their Miami girls, and Sam and Ronnie can't stop fighting. Meanwhile, Jenni stirs things up between the boys, leading to a dramatic final night. (S2, ep13)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: The cast is back together to dish the dirt on Miami - from bromances and romances, to the infamous note and the fights that followed! (S2, ep14)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Leftover tension from Miami spills over to Seaside when unresolved issues among the girls explode on the first night. And new roommate Deena gets naked in front of The Situation! Series 3, Episode 1.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: The first night's fight causes tension in the house. Ronnie & Sammi keep isolating themselves, but things really explode when Ronnie decides to chill with the other housemates. Series 3, Episode 2.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Sammi decides to make peace with Snooki and Deena. JWOWW runs into her old flame Roger and sparks fly. Meanwhile, Snooki gets arrested for public intoxication. Series 3, Episode 3.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: After Snooki is arrested, she becomes depressed... until she meets a new guy. Denna meets Ronnie's stunt double. Meanwhile, JWOWW's relationship with Tom comes to a dramatic end. Series 3, Episode 4.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Ronnie and JWOWW make up, leading to Sammi punching Ronnie in the face. Vinny picks up a girl with an overbearing family, and The Situation learns Deena's dirty little secret. Series 3, Episode 5.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Ronnie's over-drinking causes some painful side effects, Snooki meets a guy who may or may not be engaged, and Pauly D makes peace with an old nemesis. Series 3, Episode 6.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Ronnie and Sammi's tumultuous relationship finally comes to an end, but when Ronnie destroys everything Sammi owns, she must decide whether or not to leave the Shore. Series 3, Episode 7.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Ronnie feels like he has no friends left at the Shore after Sammi leaves & the housemates aren't sympathetic to him. Meanwhile, Mike tries to hook up with Pauly's ex-girlfriend! Series 3, Episode 8.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 309
programme.desc: Snooki's summer of hookups comes back to haunt her, and Mike pulls a big prank on Deena & Snooki... but the rest of the guys have the last laugh, leaving for dinner without him. Series 3, Episode 9.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 310
programme.desc: Sammi returns to the house & Ronnie is speechless. Snooki's feelings for Vinny continue to grow. Mike hooks up with a girl who he says smells like cheese, but is it just a prank? Series 3, Episode 10.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 311
programme.desc: Vinny & Pauly take a road trip to Staten Island, Jenni fears Roger's more than a rebound, & Mike reveals Sammi's shady ways, making Ronnie question his love. Series 3, Episode 11.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 312
programme.desc: Mike keeps instigating drama between Ron and Sammi, Snooki falls out with Vinny. Deena gets upset at Pauly and Vin for trying to hook up with her friend at the end-of-summer party.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 313
programme.desc: While one couple reaches a crossroads in their relationship, another couple makes it official. The roommates say goodbye to another summer at the Jersey Shore. Series 3, Episode 13.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 6

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 9

programme.desc: Two armed bank robbers hit a Seattle bank taking over 150,000 dollars. Before they can escape police confront them and the pair splits up. As authorities search block by block they learn one was a career criminal with a long history of violence.

programme.title: Critical Rescue S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: On rolling hills overlooking Oakland, California, thousands of expensive homes were crowded into a lush urban forest. The only way in or out of this little paradise was a series of steep, narrow, winding roads.

programme.title: The FBI Files S7 Ep. 121
programme.desc: The United States is one of the most profitable drug markets in the world. For ruthless and sophisticated drug traffickers, it is truly the land of opportunity.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 23
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 37
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The FBI Files S4 Ep. 51
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 29
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 77
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 76
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 82
programme.desc: Murder-for-hire is a complex crime. Solving it means finding the killer, and whoever paid for the hit. In South Carolina a death first ruled accidental was no accident, but that was just the beginning.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 68
programme.desc: An armed robbery is a terrifying ordeal. When a gang descended on a Los Angeles cash vault, they threatened to kill anyone who resisted. The violent assault was the largest heist in U.S. history and a piece of plastic was the only evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 83
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 45
programme.desc: In 2006, 31-year-old Leisha Hurst, while attending Barstow College, began dating fellow student, 34-year-old Jeami Chiapulis. Chiapulis seemed to be the man she could settle down with. The couple had plans to marry when Hurst vanished on January 22, 2009.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 37
programme.desc: In April 2006, Andrew Kissel, a real estate mogul who had embezzled more than $40 million, was found tied up and stabbed to death in the basement of his Greenwich, Connecticut mansion, just days before he was to plead guilty for his crimes.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 21
programme.desc: A report on the November 1994 murder of Farah Fratta, whose body was discovered in the garage of her Humble, Texas home. She had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 2358
programme.desc: A report on the separate disappearances in 2003 of three young women, and the investigations which not only eventually discovered the one individual who had known all three women, but led to his conviction as the killer of the three.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A report on the February 2009 disappearance of Amber Dubois, just blocks from Escondido High School in California. 48 HOURS examines the permanent impact her disappearance has had on her family, even after the discovery and conviction of the murderer.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 50
programme.desc: A report about how serial killer Andrew Urdiales was identified, arrested and convicted, and about the young woman who became the only one of his victims to survive.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 44
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 62
programme.desc: A report on the 1980 murder of Marilyn McIntyre, who was found dead in her home. Her husband, Lane, had returned home from work that morning and found her body. As police checked into his alibi, he named his friend Curt Forbes as a potential suspect.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 43
programme.desc: An examination of the story of Laura Hall, who was convicted and sent to prison for the crime of dismembering the body of Jennifer Cave in 2005.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 46
programme.desc: In June 2007, Dewayne Barrentine met Tausha Fields and soon after they began living together. Tausha told him some unbelievable stories about herself – leading Barrentine to verify her stories online, which resulted in the uncovering of a homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 51
programme.desc: A report on the 2007 murder of Jennifer Turner, married but separated from Dr. Kirk Turner, due to his infidelities with the family banker, Tondja Colvin. Jennifer had filed for divorce and also brought an alienation of affection suit against Tondja.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 59
programme.desc: In August 1996, Yvette Rodier and Zach Snarr went to the mountains for their date to take photos of the full moon, when a stranger drove up, pulled out a gun and opened fire. Zach was killed. Yvette, shot four times, survived by pretending to be dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In August 2009, Sandra Franklin called police to report a confrontation with her husband, Dr. Peter Franklin. Shortly after, authorities received a call from Peter, who had been stabbed. Within hours, Peter was dead and Sandra was charged with murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On December 2, 2000, 30-year-old Eric Miller died in a Raleigh, North Carolina hospital. Blood tests had revealed that he had been poisoned with arsenic.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Susan Wright was a stay-at-home mother from Texas who stabbed her husband Jeff, 193 times. She claimed she was a victim of domestic abuse and that on January 13, 2003, her husband attacked her with a knife and she fought back in self-defense.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On January 8, 2000, college students Danielle Keener and Dan Zapp were on a date, walking along a river’s edge outside York, Pennsylvania, when they were kidnapped at gunpoint by a man in a pick-up truck.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 42
programme.desc: In September 2006, Kathy Wangler, wife of anesthesiologist Dr. Mark Wangler, died from carbon monoxide poisoning in their home. Their 30-year marriage had been falling apart; In 2009, investigators concluded that Dr. Wangler had murdered his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 28
programme.desc: A report on the mysterious 2009 death of world champion boxer Arturo Gatti. When Gatti was found dead in Brazil, police characterized the death as a homicide and arrested his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 46
programme.desc: A report on the November 14, 2006 shooting of Danny Hill, by his wife, Charlene. Charlene claimed that their seemingly happy life together was a facade and that she shot him in self-defense

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 56
programme.desc: A report about Don North, a free spirit who took to the waters of the Caribbean, living among the tight-knit "cruiser community", a group of individuals who choose to live their lives on the water.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Phil Spector, dubbed the mad genius of rock n roll had a penchant for guns. When police are called to his mansion

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 1

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: When Rose returns home to inherit her grandmother’s dress shop, she runs into her high school crush, Cole. They soon realize that just like the shop, their love deserves a second chance as well.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can’t refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla has it all figured out, a thriving career and a loving fiance. She co-hosts Wake Up Chicago with Derek. Sparks begin to fly between them when they become the unexpected guardians of a baby.

programme.title: 10 Truths About Love
programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A novelist falls in love with a retired Navy SEAL while writing her newest book.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking and optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show.

programme.title: A Match in Manhattan
programme.desc: When Celeste loses her job as a teacher, her boss puts her forward for an au pair job with a NY Property Tycoon. As she struggles with the children, can Celeste win over Richard and his children so she can keep her job, or maybe love has other plans...

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: Podcast host Samantha has an aversion to romance but is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. She then falls for charming Jake, who calls in with a problem she is determined to solve.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a rooftop garden with an old-school country boy to appease her boss's new passion for 'green' living and secure her promotion. But love may be in bloom.

programme.title: From Italy with Amore
programme.desc: When Ariel sees her dream man, she will stop at nothing to get to know him better. In her quest to see him again, she meets restaurateur Daniel, who shows her that food is the way to her heart.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: When a scattered marketing exec is tasked with helping an unpopular small-town bootcamp turn its image around, she finds that the strict, regimented ways of its owner might just be the perfect 'fit' for love.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie and Marily are rivals in the small town of Meadow Ridge, their bakeries across the street from each other. Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.title: Love Is A Piece Of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie's a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery.

programme.title: Lower Learning
programme.desc: The teachers are drunk, every child has been left behind, and burned-out VP Tom is barely holding on.

programme.title: Loving
programme.desc: An interracial couple are sentenced to prison in Virginia in 1958 for getting married.

programme.title: Bandslam
programme.desc: Three students form an unlikely friendship after forming a band together in order to compete in a competition.

programme.title: Step Up: Year of the Dance
programme.desc: Youth from different social classes in Beijing come together to form China's best dance crew.

programme.title: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: Ten parents-to-be try to prepare for the impending births, but find the path to parenthood isn't smooth.

programme.title: Miss Potter
programme.desc: Beatrix Potter overcame a domineering mother and chauvinism to become a best-selling children's author.

programme.title: Remember Me
programme.desc: A troubled young student falls for a spirited girl after a chance encounter.

programme.title: To Rome with Love
programme.desc: The lives of some visitors and residents of Rome and the romances, adventures and predicaments they get into.

programme.title: Laggies
programme.desc: Megan panics when her boyfriend proposes. She takes an opportunity to escape for a week.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Girl
programme.desc: Tank takes his best friend Dustin's ex on a lousy date so she realizes how great a boyfriend Dustin is.

programme.title: Needle in a Timestack
programme.desc: A devoted husband will stop at nothing to save his marriage, after it gets destroyed by a time traveling rival

programme.title: Rust and Bone
programme.desc: A bouncer rescues a woman from a barroom brawl, and their relationship evolves after she loses both her legs.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 125
programme.desc: Todos los animales del bosque irán a la gran fiesta en la casita del árbol. Dora y Botas deberán cruzar el Lago Cocodrilo, pasar por encima de la Muralla de Piedra y así podrán ir ellos también a festejar.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When Blaze and Starla encounter a herd of cows wandering out in the desert, they must embark on a wild west adventure to bring them back to Starla’s barn.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Darington has built the ultimate stunt-track, and every Monster Machine in town is coming to see the show! But when a jealous Crusher tricks Darington and sends him far, far away, it’s up to Blaze and AJ to rescue him.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Fire Engine To The Rescue: Team Umizoomi is visiting the Umi City Fire Station today. When the alarm sounds, the firefighters leave the station. Just then, Vanessa's sister Abby gets stuck in a tree.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: The Counting Comet: A Counting Comet comes crashing to Earth! The only thing that can fly him home again is the Umi City Space Shuttle - and it's launching later today!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 16
programme.desc: When the train to the Big Horse Show breaks down, Dora, Boots, and Pinto the Pony need your help to get there with the ribbons, so Pinto can win his first blue prize ribbon!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and Leah invites her genies over to join the fun. Leah makes a wish to make Zac's house look haunted, but the genies turn it into a real haunted house, with a real Frankenstein! It's a spooktacular adventure!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When Zeta takes some of Ula's powerful gems, Shimmer, Shine, Leah, Nila and Ula must work together to stop her. When the girls go looking for the Zahramay Tea Flower, they run into cute little Fuzzle Whuzzles who complicate their quest.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: There's a fire on the bridge and it's too much for the Fire Chief and his team to handle. They need Firefighting Blaze to help. With time running out, Blaze hurries across town. But can he get to the bridge in time?

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Lost Dog: Milli, Geo and Bot are playing with their friend Anna and her dog, Buster! He knows lots of tricks - and when you say 'jump,' he jumps into the air - or in this case, into a truck. Oh no!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 219
programme.desc: The King of Numbers - Part 2: The team's greatest adventure ever continues, as Milli, Geo and Bot search far and wide for the keys to open Zilch's tower.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 111
programme.desc: It's breakfast time, and just as Milli, Geo and Bot are about to enjoy their cereal, they realize they're out of milk. Kids from all over town are calling in with the same problem!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: When Adara's flowers won't bloom, the girls and their friend Minu travel to a Sky Garden to find a Zummingbird who can help. Shimmer, Shine, and Leah travel to the Dragon Forest as they help Shaun track down an elusive, magical creature.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Blaze visits VelocityVille to compete with his new racecar pals in the longest race ever: the Hundred Mile Race! But Crusher is racing too, and he’ll do anything to win.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 211
programme.desc: Day at the Museum: Our friend Melissa is waiting to board the rocket ship ride at the children's museum - but then some space volcanoes erupt, requiring the help of Team Umizoomi to put things right.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ visit VelocityVille, a town full of race cars where everybody loves to go fast! But when a snooty car named Speedrick traps all the other racers, Blaze must transform into a super-fast race car to free his new friends.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Leah and Zac have been saving for months to get the big prize at the arcade. When the ticket counting machine malfunctions and ruins all of their tickets, Leah calls on her genies for some arcade assistance!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Blaze and Starla discover a map that leads to a track of legend – the Bouncing Bull Racetrack! The friends set out on a Wild West quest to find the track and take the ride of their lives.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dora travels to Brazil to play in the Big Cup Soccer Tournament, and if her team can beat the Monsters, they'll win the big cup.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 616
programme.desc: Dora and Diego Save Atlantis: Dora, Boots, and King Unicornio leave Enchanted Forest to join Diego in making the lost continent of Atlantis rise by ending an ancient feud between unicorns and dragons!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Dora and Boots journey deep into the Never-to-be-Seen-Again Forest so they can bring magic water back from Sparkling Lake and save the magic in Fairytale Land.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Dora's on her way to the doctors for her yearly check-up! Dora likes going to see Dr. Valdés because she gets to hear her heartbeat, see how much she's grown in one year, and get a new sticker at the end of the visit!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are playing with their friend Zeg when he accidentally gets blasted by a geyser into a far away mud pit. It’s up to Blaze and AJ to save him, and they must use engineering design inspired by their new dinosaur-truck-friends.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: One night, while taking care of Abuela's 3 kitties, Dora awakens to find that Lucky has chased a ball of string right into a storybook world! Help her find him on a magical moonlight adventure!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: The Umi City Toy Store: Milli, Geo and Bot meet up with their friend Colin at the Umi City Toy Shop. Colin is going to buy a quite extraordinary stuffed toy dog - but then a monkey arrives.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Blaze, Starla, and Darington can’t wait to play every animal’s favorite sport: Jungle Ball! But when their teammate Tooks the Toucan gets launched from the stadium, it’s up to the friends to get her back in the game.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dora has a big surprise for Perrito on Surprise Hill, but Swiper's trying to get there first to swipe it! Join Dora, Boots, and Perrito for an animal-filled adventure with help from lots of friends and their playful pets too!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 117
programme.desc: Geo has a new pet - a seahorse! Coincidentally, there's a problem at the Umi City Aquarium, where there's a big crack in the seahorse tank. Team Umizoomi to the rescue!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: When an overeager Crusher causes the Truck Wash to explode out into Axle City, Blaze and friends will need your help using angles to recover the pieces and get the trucks clean again!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Samira tells the girls the story of how she and Zeta first met – and how they were once best friends. / The girls must stop Zeta when she takes a scepter that gives her the power to grow magical vines and gems.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: It’s Christmas Eve, and Blaze and AJ are helping Santa load his magic bag of presents to deliver all over the world. But Crusher accidently knocks over the bag and sends the presents flying.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Blaze and Crusher discover a medieval kingdom holding a Royal Race! The two trucks become knights to compete in the race across the realm. But even though Sir Blaze is the speediest knight of all, Crusher's cheats won't make it easy to win.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find a lovable little space creature named Winky. He came to visit with his family, our Purple Planet friends. But, uh oh, he's lost. We have to get Baby Winky back to his family before their spaceship takes off!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When a mystery bandit makes off with Blaze's trophy, he'll need to track down the culprit, all while learning about magnets.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Zac uses a wish to bring his dog Rocket to Zahramay Falls – but the genies mistake him for a monster. / After using magic to make Zac forget who he is, Zeta trains him as her apprentice and tries teaching him potions.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It’s the day of the Piggy 500, and Starla is excited to race with her prize pig, Zippy, in a team race. But when her competitor Crusher and his rude pig, Slop, cheat and send Zippy far away, it’s up to Blaze, AJ, and Starla to find him.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Blaze and Zeg are on Animal Island when they discover a world of tiny creatures right under their tires: Insect City! The friends transform into a super-strong ant and a bouncy grasshopper for their littlest big adventure yet!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends compete in the most epic race in history: the Race to the Top of the World! Crusher throws them off course, Blaze and his Monster Machine friends persevere to make it to the finish line. Part 2

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: When the magical ladybugs escape from Samira's palace, the girls must get them back before Zeta cause trouble with them. When Zeta loses faith in her sorcery abilities, Shimmer, Shine and Leah help her search for something else she'd be good at.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Today is the Umi City Kite Festival and Jeannie can't wait to fly her beautiful dragon kite. Suddenly, a big gust of wind blows the kite's pieces far and wide throughout Umi City.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Gabby, Blaze and AJ are out in the wilderness when they get a call – Blaze’s friends have come down with a sickness called the Sneezles! Our heroes must race back to Axle City to bring the sick trucks the medicine oil they need.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: When a hungry Crusher accidentally turns the baker truck’s baker bots to messy mode, they sprout wheels and drive away! It’s up to AJ and Blaze to track down all the rampaging robots before Axle City is blanketed in baked goods.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Leah wishes for help making cupcakes for a bake sale, she and the genies find themselves stuck with a giant birthday cake, some farm animals, and a river of cupcake batter. How will Leah finish without any wishes left?

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Zeg has a ticket to ride a brand new dinosaur roller coaster: the Dinocoaster! But when the ticket blows away, it’s up to Blaze to help his buddy track it down and get back to the amusement park in time.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 215
programme.desc: The Incredible Presto: The Amazing Presto's big magic show is today. But when Presto takes the team backstage, one of his tricks goes wrong, sending Presto to a farm, trapping him in a watermelon!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When the girls accidentally cause Nazboo to inflate like a balloon, Zeta must help them reverse the spell. A sneezing bug buzzes through Zahramay Falls, causing all the genies to create hilarious magic when they sneeze.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Shimmer, Shine and Leah travel to a magical new land called Zahramay Skies and meet Adara, the Stardust Princess. But when Zeta shows up and lets all of Adara's stars loose, the girls must work together to retrieve the stars and save Zahramay Skies.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The girls partake in a Zahracorn Race. Zeta and Nazboo enter with a tiny, speedy Zahracorn named Tickles. The girls take Adara's Zahracorn to the salon, but must track her down when she gets spooked by all the salon magic.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 105

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 2

programme.desc: Timmy borrows Mark Chang’s Fake-i-fier in order to attend Trixie’s costume party. Unfortunately, he knows nothing about Yugopotamian technology and soon the device is causing Timmy to turn into all sorts of crazy creatures.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Helga's Boyfriend/Crush on Teacher: Helga hatches a plan to "hire" Stinky, (by bribing him with candy bars), to act as her boyfriend in hopes of making Arnold jealous.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Timmy Turner is an average kid - sort of. He's an only child with oblivious parents. But luckily he has Cosmo and Wanda, his wacky fairy godparents who help him hide from evil babysitters, do homework and much more craziness!

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Force of Nature/Viral Vidiots: At a park clean up, Timmy wishes the animals would pick up after themselves. The animals unite and launch an all-out attack on Timmy

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 23
programme.desc: The Past and the Furious: Cosmo and Wanda take Timmy on a trip back in time to meet some of their past Godkids. But things take a turn for the worst when Timmy interacts with the past and alters the future!

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 42
programme.desc: Curly Snaps/Preteen Scream: Curly gets enraged after a minor playground mix-up. He locks himself in the principal's office and refuses to come out. Phoebe has a secret crush on a pop star.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Timmy's tired of being the guinea pig when the fairies, anti-fairies and pixies compete to see "who is the best magical creature in the universe?" He suggests a competition to determine once and for all who is best.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Arnold is given the assignment to tutor Torvald, the meanest, toughest kid in Arnold's math class, for the big math test on Friday./Gerald convinces Arnold to allow him to spend the night at Arnold's house.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Monkey Business/Big Caesar: After being scratched by an organ grinder's monkey, Helga is convinced her days are numbered.Arnold and Gerald attempt to catch the biggest fish in the city pond.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Arnold's pet pig, Abner, escapes one night while Arnold is sleeping. /Grandpa entrusts Arnold with the job of fetching his prized pocket watch from the repair shop.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When L.O.S.E.R.S. Attack: Timmy’s enemies join forces and form the League Of Super Evil Revenge Seekers – L.O.S.E.R.S., for short - in order to annihilate him.
